ul.li: Block device FD is valid and positioned. Action:
Identify current tail and head pointers.
JE_COMMIT (0x09) detected for sequence_id. Atomic Action:
Locate all JE_DATA with matching seq_id.
Constraint: Redo operations must be idempotent.
0x03: I/O Error (Hardware failure) Resolution: Manual fsck.jfs required.
